title: wb-narrative.pipeline
description: Center-pane pipeline state snapshot: step progress + results + edit drafts

data.description: Step output data (structure varies by step type)

steps.description: Ordered list of pipeline steps with their current status

activeEntryKey.description: The history entry currently being viewed

pipelineOrder.description: Authoritative step execution order from SSE announce

viewMode.description: Current view mode in the center pane

focusedStepId.description: Step currently focused/expanded by the user

editDrafts.description: User edit drafts keyed by stepId or 'stepId::nodeId'
